The affected element is the function _try_process_local_file/_try_process_url of the file src/ragas/metrics/collections/multi_modal_faithfulness/util.py of the component Collections Module. Performing a manipulation of the argument retrieved_contexts results in server-side request forgery. The attack can be initiated remotely. The exploit has been released to the public and may be used for attacks. The security patch for CVE-2025-45691 was applied to a different module only. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00277, "percentile": 0.19516}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-95ww-475f-pr4f", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-22T22:02:02Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-95ww-475f-pr4f", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-95ww-475f-pr4f"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-6587"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-20T00:16:34Z", "published_at": "2026-04-20T00:30:13Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-6587", "https://adithyanak.com/ragas-v0214-arbitrary-file-read-vulnerability", "https://vuldb.com/submit/791088", "https://vuldb.com/vuln/358222", "https://vuldb.com/vuln/358222/cti", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-95ww-475f-pr4f"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/vibrantlabsai/ragas", "summary": "RAGAS has SSRF via Multi-Modal Faithfulness Collections Module", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-22T22:02:03Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-95ww-475f-pr4f", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "ragas"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.2.3, <= 0.4.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: RAGAS has SSRF via Multi-Modal Faithfulness Collections Module
